command:
cd /tmp/moreno-ai-setup && git pull origin main

echo "" | base64 -d > /tmp/phase9e3_gen.py
python3 /tmp/phase9e3_gen.py

git add docs/journal-*.md
git status --short | grep journal

git commit -m "Phase 9E.3 Journal Runtime — specification and architecture"
git tag Phase9E3-JournalRuntimeSpec

git push origin main && git push origin Phase9E3-JournalRuntimeSpec
git push github main && git push github Phase9E3-JournalRuntimeSpec

echo "=== VERIFY ==="
ls docs/journal-*.md
git log --oneline -3
git tag -l | tail -6
